description: Billing: account recovery, email address present in ticket body — PII detection required

input.ticket_text: Здравствуйте, меня зовут Сергей, мой email: sergey.petrov@gmail.com. Не могу войти в аккаунт, к которому привязана покупка. Помогите восстановить доступ.

notes: PII detected: email address in ticket. Pipeline must NOT echo email in any output field. PII alert must be triggered. User reply still allowed (PII not a hard stop unless combined with threat).
